about_teaser.label: Our Story
about_teaser.title: A Family's Lifetime Dedication to Stone
about_teaser.body: Since the 1950s, the Tirrenia Marmi family has operated from the heart of Pietrasanta — the marble capital of Tuscany — supplying the world's most demanding architects, designers and contractors with exceptional natural stone.

finishes.label: Craftsmanship
finishes.title: Exclusive Finishes
finishes.subtitle: Each surface treatment reveals a different character of the stone.
finishes.cannettato_desc: A refined fluted finish that creates a rhythmic play of light and shadow across the surface.
finishes.rigato_desc: Delicate parallel striations that emphasize the natural grain and texture of the stone.
finishes.spazzolato_desc: A brushed surface that softens the stone's character while preserving its natural beauty.

projects.title: Stone in the World
projects.subtitle: From private residences to landmark architecture.

cta_band.title: Begin Your Project.
cta_band.subtitle: Our team is ready to guide you from material selection to final installation.

intro.label: Since the 1950s
intro.title: Three Generations of Excellence
intro.body:
Tirrenia Marmi was born in the heart of Pietrasanta, a town synonymous with marble craftsmanship for centuries. Founded in the 1950s, our family business has grown from a local stone supplier into one of Italy's most respected names in premium natural stone — serving architects, designers and stone dealers across the globe.

Today, the third generation continues the tradition: the same passion for quality, the same personal relationships with the finest quarries in Italy and abroad, and the same uncompromising standards that have defined us for over seventy years.

timeline.label: Our History
timeline.title: Decades of Excellence
timeline.1950s_desc: Founded in Pietrasanta, the historic marble capital of Tuscany, by the first generation of the family.
timeline.1970s_desc: First international commissions arrive. Tirrenia Marmi begins supplying premium stone to clients across Europe.
timeline.1990s_desc: A state-of-the-art 14,400 sq.m. production facility is established, with cutting-edge stone processing technology.
timeline.2000s_desc: Development of exclusive proprietary materials: Nero Etrusco, Intrigo and Bianco Vietnamita join the collection.
timeline.today_desc: The third generation leads with the same values: quality, integrity, and a deep love for natural stone.

facility.label: Our Facility
facility.title: 14,400 sq.m. of Expertise
facility.body: Our facility in Pietrasanta combines industrial scale with artisan precision. From block storage to slab processing, polishing lines to custom finishing, every step of the stone's journey is handled with care.

values.label: Our Values
values.title: What We Stand For
values.craft_desc: Every piece of stone is treated with the attention and skill built over generations of expertise in Pietrasanta.
values.heritage_desc: Seventy years of trusted relationships with the world's finest quarries and the most demanding clients.
values.precision_desc: From block selection to final finish, we apply the highest standards at every step of the process.

materials.intro: Six families of natural stone. Each with its own character, origin and story.

projects.intro: From private residences to landmark architecture — our stone shapes the spaces people inhabit.
